channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zimbabwe Is First in World to Cut Rates After US-Iran Peace Deal @business
item.description: via Bloomberg #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg

item.title: South Africa and Zimbabwe Enter Peak Dry-Season Safari Window, Unlocking Exceptional Wildlife Visibility, Concentrated Game Viewing, and High-Value Tourism Opportunities Across National Parks

item.dc:creator: Travel And Tour World

item.title: Zimbabwe Sees Rising Indian Visitor Arrivals as Travel Live Brings Thirty Five Tourists to Victoria Falls and Hwange National Park in 2026 Tourism Growth Push

item.dc:creator: Travel And Tour World

item.title: Zimbabwean digital creator leaves South Africa @bulawayo24
item.description: Zimbabwean digital creator Shawty Zw has revealed the deeply personal reasons behind her decision to leave South Africa and relocate to Harare, saying the move was motivated by a desire for peace of m... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Rinomhota commits to one more year to Reading FC
item.description: ZIMBABWE international Andy Rinomhota has signed a new one-year contract with English League One side Reading FC, extending his stay at the club until the end of the 2026/27 season. The 29-year-old midfielder returned to Reading in November last year, rejoining the club where he via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabwe’s Nobukhosi Tshuma Makes History With Comrades Marathon Silver
item.description: Nobukhosi Tshuma Makes History With Comrades Marathon Silver Zimbabwean long-distance runner Nobukhosi Tshuma etched her name into the history books after securing a remarkable second-place finish at the 2026 Comrades Marathon in South Africa on Sunday. Tshuma crossed the finish via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Tentative deal reached to end Iran war, Trump orders stop to US naval blockade
item.description: Deal potentially allows desperately needed oil and natural gas to reach the global market The post Tentative deal reached to end Iran war, Trump orders stop to US naval blockade appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. via Zimbabwean News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Residents fume over ex-town clerk’s package @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Residents fume over ex-town clerk’s package – herald Engineer Hosiah Chisango Trust Freddy Herald Correspondent HARARE residents and legal experts have called on the local authority to immediately open its books and disclose the financial terms of the exit package agreed via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Housing project to benefit youths @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Housing project to benefit youths – herald Victor Maphosa Mashonaland East Bureau THE allocation of residential stands at Dunnotar Farm in Seke, under the Munhumutapa Housing Programme, will start next month as the land developer makes final touches, with the youth from M via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: ZMX grain auction trade climbs above US$1m

item.title: Responsible mining in Zimbabwe... The evolving role of environmental impact assessments in balancing growth, sustainability, and community well-being
